arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich LIVE match updates from big Champions League clash
arts.sum: Emery spoke in his pre-match match press conference about how his side must improve defensively if they are to remain competitive at the top level having shipped nine goals in six league games and 56 goals in 34 games in all competitions this calendar year. Elite European football returns to Villa Park this evening as Aston Villa host six-time Champions League winners Bayern Munich at Villa Park (8pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran ‘next sale’ hope revealed as Aston Villa striker receives attitude advice
arts.sum: We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it. BirminghamLive has launched its very own WhatsApp community to give you the opportunity to receive the latest Aston Villa news straight to your messages.

arts.ttl: Who is Radu Petrescu, the referee for Aston Villa - Bayern Munich in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: Romania’s Radu Petrescu will referee today’s Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Bayern Munich, as the Premier League club plays its first home European Cup game in just over four decades. Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich: start time, how to watch

arts.ttl: European Cup legend happy Aston Villa rejected '£60m' Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: But a pleasing fact is that he didn't go and now, as you are saying, he has come to the forefront and scoring goals not only for Aston Villa but also for the national team as well. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.

arts.ttl: £49m bonanza on the cards as Celtic chief with 16 years of service joins Aston Villa
arts.sum: Aston Villa have poached a key member of Celtic’s executive team and are now looking to leverage the move to gain a financial edge over...

arts.ttl: Dean Saunders picks out the Aston Villa star central to sealing historic Bayern win
arts.sum: Aston Villa face Bayern Munich at Villa Park on Wednesday night in a rerun of the 1982 European Cup final and Dean Saunders thinks his old side have a clear path to victory

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen pleased with improvements of Kim Min-jae, Dayot Upamecano
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s perfect start to the season under Vincent Kompany came to an end with their 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen at the Allianz Arena over the weekend, but their performance was quite arguably deserving of three points. After the Leverkusen draw, club CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen spoke highly of the improvements he has already seen so far this season with both Upamecano and Kim.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich delighted with João Palhinha
arts.sum: Still a rotational player for now, Palhinha nonetheless earned plaudits from Bayern sporting director Christoph Freund for his transition to Bavaria. “We are very, very happy that we have Palhinha,” sporting director Christoph Freud said in comments captured by Az journalist Maximilian Koch (via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Dreesen and Bayern happy with centre-back pairing
arts.sum: Speaking after Bayern München's 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen at the weekend, the club's CEO, Jan-Christian Dreesen outlined how happy he is with the current pair of central defenders in Vincent Kompany's starting XI.

arts.ttl: How much Aston Villa are charging for Champions League tickets and how it compares to rivals
arts.sum: The most expensive Liverpool ticket for a Champions League fixture is £61, although the same ticket is significantly cheaper for Over-65 (£45.75), Young Adult (£30.50) and Junior (£9). Villa confirmed the ticket prices for the respective fixtures in September, which has led to comparisons being made with their rival British clubs.
